targetUser: Founder, operator or service team reviewing inbound interest manually.
businessJob: Structure inbound interest into a reviewable intake before any human follow-up decision.
valueHypothesis: A future Capsule could make lead review clearer by separating public-safe context, unanswered questions and human next steps.
day1UserBenefit: A visitor sees how a Capsule could turn leads into reviewable work without forms, CRM sync, email send or WhatsApp actions.

publicSafeExamples: Public-safe source label such as website contact or event conversation
Conceptual qualification notes with no personal identifiers
forbiddenData: No email, phone, DNI, customerId or tenantId
No API key, provider key or connector payload
No prompt text, raw evidence or private runtime path

runtimeBoundary: No private runtime is included; this manifest is not executable and cannot authorize or perform work.
connectorBoundary: No connector execution is included; CRM, email and messaging systems remain outside C03.
dataBoundary: No secrets, no customer data, no telemetry, no PII, no prompt text, no raw evidence and no connector payloads are included.
complianceBoundary: No regulated advice, legal audit proof, compliance certification or ROI guarantee is provided.
ipBoundary: This public manifest preserves the source-available launcher posture and does not expose private runtime code.
cloudHandoffBoundary: Future Cloud handoff would require separate approved implementation and review before any hosted behavior exists.
localByokBoundary: Future local/BYOK setup would require separate configuration work; no API keys are requested here.
futureImplementationNotes: A future implementation would require private runtime review semantics outside this public manifest.
A future implementation would require approved connector and data boundaries before any live action exists.
C03 ships manifest only, not executable template behavior.
